indicators.name: large open space
indicators.rationale: The open space lacks a dedicated area for focused work, making it difficult to set up a workstation.

indicators.name: lack of flat personal work surface
indicators.rationale: There is no flat surface at sitting height suitable for placing a laptop or keyboard.

indicators.name: seating arrangement
indicators.rationale: The seating arrangement is designed for social interaction rather than individual work, making it unsuitable for solo computer work.

indicators.name: ambient lighting
indicators.rationale: Ambient lighting is not sufficient for task illumination required for screen work.

reasoning_summary: The indoor scene is marginally adequate for computer work (solo). The large open space and lack of flat personal work surface make it challenging to set up a workstation. The seating arrangement and ambient lighting further detract from the suitability for focused solo work.
